_comment: Inputs for H2 (Release Theory of Heat) verification. H2 is a structural/symbolic claim — most 'inputs' are symbolic rather than numerical. A single numerical test uses a synthetic cooling curve to demonstrate the exponential decay.

synthetic_cooling_demo._comment: Illustrative numerical test of Newton's cooling solution dρ/dt = -λ(ρ-ρ₀). Values are synthetic/dimensionless for demo purposes.

rho_initial.source: synthetic demo — initial excess of 4 above background

reference_physics._comment: Standard-physics claims H2 is structurally consistent with (not reproduced numerically).
reference_physics.equipartition: C_V = (3/2) k_B T for monatomic ideal gas
